message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:45 and should leave on friday
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from broxbourne
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 4 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the centre
The hotel should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
